info.title: FAQ API
info.description: API for managing FAQ Sets and Q&A pairs in a project's knowledge base.

post.description: This endpoint allows for the creation of an FAQ set within a project.  Users can submit a list of Q&A pairs that form the FAQ set.  Each FAQ set is identified by a unique FAQ set ID and is associated with the project.

get.description: This endpoint retrieves a list of all FAQ sets associated with the project.  It provides an overview of each FAQ set, including IDs, names, update times, and status.
Retrieve the details and Q&A pairs of a specific FAQ set by its unique ID.  This is useful for examining the content of individual FAQ sets within a project.

delete.description: This endpoint allows for the deletion of a specific FAQ set using its unique ID.  It is useful for removing outdated or irrelevant FAQ sets from a project.

faqSetID.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the FAQ Set. This ID is used to specify and access the FAQ Set within the knowledge base.

name.description: The name assigned to the new FAQ set.

faqs.description: A list of question and answer pairs that make up the FAQ set.

question.description: The question part of the Q&A pair.

answer.description: The answer corresponding to the question in the pair.
